proposed_hypotheses.text: In ER-positive patients, treatment_palbociclib increases mean pfs_months relative to no palbociclib.
In patients who are ER-positive AND HER2-negative, treatment_palbociclib increases mean pfs_months.
In patients who are ER-positive AND HER2-negative AND PIK3CA wild-type (pik3ca_mutation=0), treatment_palbociclib increases mean pfs_months substantially more than in unselected patients.
Outside the ER+/HER2-/PIK3CA-WT subgroup (i.e., ER-negative, OR HER2-positive, OR PIK3CA-mutated), treatment_palbociclib has no meaningful effect on pfs_months.

Outside the joint subgroup (n_treat=10857, n_ctrl=20462): pfs_months 4.319 vs 4.316; diff=+0.003, p=0.91.

proposed_hypotheses.text: In the subgroup defined by er_positive=1 & her2_positive=0 & pik3ca_mutation=0, treatment_palbociclib increases mean pfs_months by approximately +2.908.
In the subgroup defined by er_positive=1 & pik3ca_mutation=0, treatment_palbociclib increases mean pfs_months by approximately +2.376.
In the subgroup defined by pr_positive=1 & pik3ca_mutation=0, treatment_palbociclib increases mean pfs_months by approximately +2.246.
In the subgroup defined by her2_low=1 & pik3ca_mutation=0, treatment_palbociclib increases mean pfs_months by approximately +2.044.
In the subgroup defined by her2_positive=0 & pik3ca_mutation=0, treatment_palbociclib increases mean pfs_months by approximately +2.036.
In the subgroup defined by er_positive=1 & her2_low=1, treatment_palbociclib increases mean pfs_months by approximately +1.944.

proposed_hypotheses.text: FINAL: treatment_palbociclib increases mean pfs_months in the subgroup defined by er_positive=1 AND her2_positive=0 AND pik3ca_mutation=0; outside this subgroup, the effect is null. The unfavorable values that suppress the effect are her2_positive=1 (HER2-positive) and pik3ca_mutation=1 (PIK3CA mutation).
FINAL: treatment_olaparib increases mean pfs_months in the subgroup defined by brca1_mutation=1 OR brca2_mutation=1; outside this subgroup the effect is null.
FINAL: treatment_trastuzumab affects mean pfs_months only in HER2-positive (her2_positive=1) patients. (Effect direction and significance to be verified by the test.)
FINAL: treatment_pembrolizumab affects mean pfs_months only in ER-negative AND HER2-negative (TNBC-like) patients.
FINAL: treatment_sacituzumab_govitecan affects mean pfs_months only in HER2-low (her2_low=1) patients.
FINAL: treatment_tamoxifen affects mean pfs_months only in ER-positive AND postmenopausal (er_positive=1 AND postmenopausal=1) patients.
